global_summary.note: v0.80 — IDC validation + 7 vendor anchor upgrades on top of v0.79's weekly extrapolation. NEW HARD DATA: (1) Pichai disclosed Gemini at 16B tokens/min via API at Cloud Next 2026 Q1 earnings (up from 10B in Q4 2025, +60% QoQ); (2) Anthropic Opus 4.7 launched April 16 with new tokenizer producing up to 35% more tokens, Claude MAU +44% Mar→Apr to 23M; (3) Microsoft Q3 FY26 (Apr 29) AI business ARR $37B (+123% YoY), Copilot 20M paid seats; (4) Kimi K2.6 launched April 20, ARR doubled $100M→$200M, $2B funding closing May 6 at $20B valuation; (5) DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash launched April 24 with 1M context; (6) Qwen 3.6-Plus released April 2 + Alibaba Token Hub reorg; (7) Hunyuan 3.0 launched April 2026. INDEPENDENT VALIDATION: IDC China Public Cloud MaaS report (May 7) confirms Volcengine #1 at 49.5% market share — see methodology_triangulation block. Global cascades 264T → 305T.

methodology_triangulation.purpose: GATT is the only public dataset measuring global AI inference in token units across all vendor surfaces. This block positions GATT relative to IDC, Gartner, and a16z, addressing journalist questions about why GATT numbers may differ from IDC's.

external_sources.source: IDC China Public Cloud Large Model Services
external_sources.scope: China only · external enterprise MaaS calls only · excludes internal first-party (Douyin / Doubao App / Jimeng / WeChat AI etc.)
validates_gatt: Volcengine #1 ranking in China (49.5% MaaS) corroborates GATT's Doubao #1 globally
Growth: IDC's 16× YoY 2024→2025 + projected 20× for 2026 ≈ ~27%/mo, supports GATT's 22%/mo trajectory assumption
Scale: IDC 2026 forecast 110T/day average (external MaaS only) is consistent with GATT China total 153T/day (all-sources)
differs_from_gatt: Scope: IDC measures only external enterprise public-cloud MaaS calls; GATT measures all-sources inference (external + internal first-party + consumer apps)
Frequency: IDC annual / semi-annual; GATT continuously updated

Math check: IDC 2025 average 5.32T/day total external MaaS × Volcengine 49.5% = 2.64T/day external Volcengine in 2025. The 120T/day Volcengine figure (Apr 1, 2026) cannot fit IDC's external-only scope under any plausible growth path — therefore GATT's 129T/day Doubao number is inherently all-sources (external + internal Douyin AI Search + Doubao App + Jimeng + first-party pipelines). Internal usage estimated at ≥95% of total Volcengine throughput.

validates_gatt: US 76% / China 11.6% infrastructure spending split mirrors GATT's US 87% Token GDP / China 6% Token GDP — both show US dominance in compute economic value despite Chinese token volume parity
differs_from_gatt: Unit: USD vs tokens — IDC's spending lens vs GATT's volume lens
Gartner does not publish token-volume figures
Gartner aggregates AI spending; GATT decomposes by vendor token throughput

external_sources.source: a16z State of AI Empirical 100T Token Study
validates_gatt: Confirms aggregator-tier vendor rankings (Kimi K2.6 at 1.85T weekly = #2 OpenRouter)
Provides independent OpenRouter signal for GATT's #12 OpenRouter vendor entry
differs_from_gatt: Coverage: OpenRouter only (~1.13T/day = 0.4% of GATT's global total); GATT covers all 20 top vendors plus consumer surfaces

gatt_unique_value: Only public dataset measuring token volume globally (not just China)
Only dataset using all-sources scope (vendor API + internal first-party + consumer apps + on-device)
Only dataset publishing per-vendor estimates with full revision history
Only dataset normalizing across vendors via Token GDP ($/M token blended pricing)
Daily / weekly update cadence vs quarterly / annual for IDC / Gartner
Free and CC BY 4.0 vs paywalled IDC / Gartner reports

token_gdp.note: Blended price per vendor region. US ~$1.50/M tokens, EU ~$1.20/M, CN ~$0.10/M, ROW ~$0.90/M.
token_gdp.key_insight: China and US are now essentially tied on token volume (50.2% vs 49.8%) — a sharp contrast to the 57/38 split just one week ago. The shift reflects new US hard data (Pichai 16B tokens/min, Microsoft Q3 $37B AI ARR, Anthropic Opus 4.7 + MAU +44%) — not slowed Chinese growth. The 15× pricing gap remains: US still captures 87% of Token GDP.

key_stats.headline: A US user generates 589× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user (454K vs 0.77K)
key_stats.great_divergence: China: 50% of tokens, 6% of Token GDP. US: 50% of tokens, 87% of Token GDP. Volume gap closed in five weeks (was 57/38 on May 4) as US hard data accumulated.
key_stats.doubao_note: Doubao remains #1 globally (129T/day, all-sources scope including external MaaS + internal Douyin AI / Doubao App / Jimeng). IDC May 7 report independently confirms Volcengine #1 in China at 49.5% external MaaS market share. Global share dipped from 49% to 42% as Gemini's Q1 16B-tokens/min disclosure rebalanced the index.
key_stats.openai_api_milestone: OpenAI APIs at 15 billion tokens/minute (Mar 31 official, held). GPT-5.5 launched Apr 23, GPT-5.5 Instant May 5.
key_stats.gemini_api_milestone: Pichai disclosed Gemini hit 16B tokens/min via direct API at Cloud Next 2026 / Q1 2026 earnings, up from 10B in Q4 2025 — +60% in one quarter. Single biggest US-side disclosure since GATT launch.
key_stats.microsoft_milestone: Q3 FY2026 (Apr 29): AI business ARR $37B (+123% YoY), Microsoft 365 Copilot crossed 20M paid seats (vs 15M Jan), Microsoft-OpenAI partnership restructured Apr 27 to non-exclusive.
key_stats.anthropic_milestone: Opus 4.7 launched April 16 (new tokenizer +35% tokens for same input). Claude MAU +44% Mar→Apr to 23M — biggest growth among top AI apps in April.
key_stats.kimi_milestone: K2.6 launched April 20 (1T params, 262K context, ties GPT-5.5 on SWE-Bench Pro at 80% lower cost). ARR doubled $100M → $200M Mar → Apr. $2B funding round closing May 6 at $20B valuation.
key_stats.idc_validation: IDC May 7 China Public Cloud MaaS report: Volcengine 49.5% (#1), 2025 market 1,944T tokens, 2026 forecast 40,000T. Independently corroborates GATT's #1 ranking and growth trajectory. See methodology_triangulation block.

vendors.name: Doubao (ByteDance)
vendors.scope_note: ALL-SOURCES: external MaaS calls + internal first-party (Douyin AI Search, Doubao App, Jimeng, Volcengine internal pipelines). IDC May 7 report measures only external MaaS (49.5% market share — independently confirms GATT's #1 ranking in China). Internal usage estimated at ≥95% of total Volcengine throughput.
vendors.source: Volcengine officially announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). IDC May 7 report independently confirms Volcengine #1 in China external MaaS at 49.5% (2025 full year). 33-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Apr 1 anchor.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate from Volcano Engine Q3 2025 disclosure
OFFICIAL: Volcengine 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo Apr 1, 2026

Held. IDC May 7 report independently confirms Volcengine #1 in China at 49.5% external MaaS market share. Math check (IDC 2025 1944T / 365 × 49.5% = 2.64T/day external) vs Volcengine official 120T/day demonstrates >95% of Doubao throughput is internal first-party usage. Confidence reaffirmed at high.

vendors.note: GATT scope: all-sources. IDC scope: external MaaS only. Both rank Volcengine/Doubao #1 in China.

vendors.name: Google Gemini (All Surfaces)
vendors.source: MAJOR UPGRADE: Pichai at Cloud Next 2026 / Q1 2026 earnings (April) — 'Gemini models now process more than 16 billion tokens per minute via direct API' = 23T/day API only. Up from 10B/min in Q4 2025 (+60%). 750M Gemini App MAU. Google Cloud +48% YoY. Gemma 4 launched Apr 1. 330 organizations process >1T tokens each annually on Google Cloud.
vendors.note: Q1 2026 disclosure was the biggest single Gemini upgrade since GATT launch: API throughput jumped from 10B → 16B tokens/min in one quarter. All Surfaces estimate = API (23T) × ~3.2 multiplier for Search AI Overviews + Gemini App + Workspace = 73T (multiplier reduced from 4× since API outpaced consumer surface attach). Confidence upgraded medium-high → high.

revision_history.reason: MAJOR UPGRADE: Pichai disclosed 16B tokens/min via direct API at Cloud Next 2026 (April), up from 10B in Q4 2025 — +60% in one quarter. 16B × 60 × 24 = 23T/day API only. All Surfaces revised to 73T using 3.2× multiplier (down from 4×). Confidence upgraded medium-high → high.

vendors.name: OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)
vendors.source: OFFICIAL: 15B tokens/min API (Mar 31 — held as anchor). GPT-5.5 launched April 23 (now ChatGPT default via 5.5 Instant May 5). Some developers reportedly hitting 40M tokens/min during launch. $25B+ ARR; targeting $29.4B for 2026 (+18%). 1M+ business customers, 9M+ paying business users, 4M+ developers.
vendors.note: GPT-5.5 (Apr 23) and 5.5 Instant (May 5) launched within v0.79→v0.80 window. Token-efficient per task but spike in launch usage drives net total up. Conservative bump 44 → 45T (vs theoretical 47T at 15%/mo).

revision_history.reason: GPT-5.5 Instant May 5 became ChatGPT default. Some devs hitting 40M tokens/min during launch. 5-day extrapolation + launch boost.

vendors.name: Claude (Anthropic)
vendors.source: MAJOR: Claude MAU surged 44% Mar→Apr to 23M (BigGo/Similarweb — biggest growth among top AI apps in April). Opus 4.7 launched April 16 — new tokenizer produces up to 35% more tokens for same input. Claude Code Pro test removal Apr 21. $25B+ ARR per SemiAnalysis.
vendors.note: Three compounding tailwinds: (1) Claude MAU +44% Mar→Apr — biggest growth among top AI apps in April; (2) Opus 4.7 tokenizer change inflates token counts up to 35% for identical inputs; (3) Compute strain continues. v0.79 was 19T at 18%/mo extrapolation; v0.80 bumps to 22T to incorporate the previously-uncaptured Opus 4.7 launch and MAU surge.

revision_history.reason: MAJOR: Three previously-uncaptured signals — (1) Opus 4.7 launched April 16 with new tokenizer producing up to 35% more tokens for same input; (2) Claude MAU +44% Mar→Apr to 23M, biggest growth among top AI apps in April (BigGo/Similarweb); (3) Continued compute strain. Confidence upgraded medium-high → high.

vendors.name: DeepSeek
vendors.source: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash launched April 24 — 1M token context, 1.6T params MoE / 49B active (V4 Pro), 284B / 13B (V4 Flash). #3 enterprise market share (behind Anthropic, OpenAI). 130M MAU. Pricing $0.145/M input, $1.74/M output (~7× cheaper than GPT-5.5).
vendors.note: V4 launch (Apr 24) is significant: 1M context window doubles V3, MoE efficiency improvements likely accelerate adoption. #3 in enterprise dev SDK usage. v0.79 had 8.2T held; v0.80 bumps to 9.2T to incorporate V4 Pro/Flash launch.

revision_history.reason: 130M MAU, V4 Lite on Huawei chips
DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash launched April 24 with 1M-token context window. Now #3 in enterprise developer SDK usage. 15-day extrapolation at 10%/mo + V4 launch boost.

vendors.name: Azure OpenAI Service + Microsoft 365 Copilot
vendors.source: Q3 FY2026 earnings (Apr 29, 2026): AI business ARR $37 billion, +123% YoY. Microsoft 365 Copilot crossed 20M paid seats (vs 15M in Jan). Azure +40% growth. GitHub Copilot 4.7M+ paid subs. Microsoft-OpenAI partnership restructured Apr 27 to non-exclusive license through 2032 (no more revenue share to OpenAI). Capex $190B for FY26.
vendors.note: Confidence upgraded low → medium. AI business ARR scale ($37B) is now disclosed quarterly — strongest enterprise AI signal in the index. Copilot seat count nearly tripled YoY. New non-exclusive structure with OpenAI may shift Microsoft toward more own-model inference.

revision_history.reason: Q3 FY2026 earnings (Apr 29): AI business ARR $37B (+123% YoY); Microsoft 365 Copilot 20M paid seats (vs 15M Jan, +33% in Q3 alone); Azure +40%. Microsoft-OpenAI partnership restructured Apr 27 (non-exclusive). Confidence upgraded low → medium.

vendors.name: Qwen (Alibaba Cloud)
vendors.source: Qwen 3.6-Plus released April 2 with enhanced coding (Caixin Apr 2). Alibaba reorganized into 'Alibaba Token Hub' — consolidating Qwen, Tongyi Lab, and Wukong enterprise unit under CEO Eddie Wu. 13.9% China market share. IDC May 7 report places Alibaba Bailian #2 in China external MaaS at 27% (H1 2025).
vendors.note: Alibaba Token Hub reorg (Apr 2026) consolidating five separately operating units suggests serious enterprise AI commitment. Qwen 3.6-Plus coding upgrade aligns with developer market push.

revision_history.reason: Qwen #1 in CN enterprise share of 37T/day

Qwen 3.6-Plus released Apr 2 with enhanced coding capabilities. Alibaba Token Hub reorg consolidates Qwen + Tongyi Lab + Wukong under Eddie Wu. IDC May 7 confirms Alibaba Bailian #2 in China external MaaS at 27%. 37-day extrapolation at 8%/mo.

vendors.name: Hunyuan (Tencent)
vendors.source: Hunyuan flagship launched April 2026 (~30B params, in-context learning + agent focus, led by Shunyu Yao — ex-OpenAI, appointed Tencent chief AI scientist Dec 2025). Yuanbao image gen integration with DeepSeek (May 7). Yuanbao 50M DAU peak (Spring Festival 2026). 900 internal Tencent apps.

revision_history.reason: 50M DAU peak, low retention vs Doubao/Qwen
New flagship Hunyuan model launched April 2026 (Shunyu Yao led, agent-focused). Yuanbao integrated DeepSeek for image generation May 7. 24-day extrapolation at 12%/mo from Apr 15 anchor.

vendors.name: Kimi (Moonshot AI)
vendors.source: Kimi K2.6 launched April 20, 2026 — 1T params total / 32B active MoE, 262K context, ties GPT-5.5 on SWE-Bench Pro at 80% lower cost. ARR doubled in one month: $100M (Mar) → $200M (Apr). $2B funding round closing May 6, $20B post-money valuation. Weekly OpenRouter volume 1.85T tokens (#2 globally on OR).
vendors.note: Fastest-growing vendor in v0.80 update. ARR doubled in 30 days. K2.6 ties GPT-5.5 on coding at ~80% discount. OpenRouter 1.85T weekly = 0.264T/day from OR alone. With agent + Kimi Code adoption, total estimated 2.5T/day. Growth rate raised 25% → 30%/mo.

revision_history.reason: Kimi K2.6 launched April 20 — 1T params, 262K context, ties GPT-5.5 on SWE-Bench Pro at 80% lower cost. ARR doubled $100M → $200M Mar → Apr. $2B funding round closing May 6 at $20B valuation. OpenRouter weekly 1.85T tokens (#2). Growth rate raised 25% → 30%/mo.

vendors.name: ERNIE (Baidu)
vendors.source: Ernie 5.0 launched Jan 22, 2026 (2.4T params MoE, native omni-modal). 202M MAU (Feb 2026). Q2 2024 baseline: 1T tokens/day, 600M API calls/day; Feb 2025: 16.5B daily API calls. IDC May 7 report places Baidu Qianfan #3 in China external MaaS at 17%.

revision_history.reason: 33-day extrapolation at 5%/mo. IDC May 7 confirms Baidu Qianfan #3 in China external MaaS at 17%. Awaiting Baidu Q1 2026 earnings (May).

vendors.name: Spark (iFlytek)
vendors.source: iFlytek Q4 2025 earnings

vendors.name: OpenRouter
vendors.source: Top traffic models in Apr-May 2026: Kimi K2.6 (1.85T weekly), DeepSeek V4 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4. a16z 'State of AI' Empirical 100T Token Study uses OpenRouter as data source.

revision_history.reason: 33-day extrapolation at 10%/mo. Kimi K2.6 + DeepSeek V4 driving aggregator volume.

vendors.name: Mistral AI
vendors.source: $400M ARR ÷ blended token price

vendors.name: Grok (xAI)
vendors.source: DOWNGRADE: Grok MAU dropped 12.5% Mar→Apr to 12.2M (Similarweb). Tumbled from 2nd to 5th place in global mobile app rankings. Claude (+44% to 23M) and Gemini (+19%) gained share. 80+ staff (incl. several co-founders) left xAI in recent months per Fast Company. Grok 4.1 launched but adoption lagging.
vendors.note: First vendor in GATT history with negative growth rate. MAU down 12.5%, brain drain (80+ staff incl co-founders), feature paywalling, regulatory scrutiny. Conservative hold at 0.55T (vs theoretical 0.6T).

revision_history.reason: 0.6% AI chatbot market share, Grok 4.1 launched

DOWNGRADE: MAU dropped 12.5% Mar→Apr to 12.2M (Similarweb). Tumbled from 2nd to 5th place mobile rankings. Brain drain: 80+ staff incl co-founders left. Claude (+44%) and Gemini (+19%) gained share at Grok's expense. Growth rate now -5%/mo. FIRST NEGATIVE-GROWTH VENDOR IN GATT HISTORY.

correction_log.old: GATT methodology stood unvalidated by independent token-volume research
correction_log.new: IDC China Public Cloud MaaS report (May 7) independently confirms Volcengine #1 at 49.5% market share. China 2025 total 1,944T tokens, 2026 forecast 40,000T. See methodology_triangulation block. Adds Doubao scope_note (all-sources vs IDC external-only).
correction_log.reason: First independent validation of GATT's #1 ranking by an external commercial research firm. Critical methodology refinement: GATT measures all-sources Doubao throughput, while IDC measures external MaaS only. Math: IDC 2025 5.32T/day × 49.5% = 2.64T/day external Volcengine — vs the 120T/day Volcengine official figure means ≥95% of throughput is internal first-party usage.

MAJOR: Pichai disclosed Gemini hit 16B tokens/min via direct API at Cloud Next 2026 / Q1 2026 earnings, up from 10B in Q4 2025 (+60% in one quarter). API throughput now 23T/day. All Surfaces multiplier reduced 4× → 3.2× since API outpaced consumer surface attach.

Three previously-uncaptured signals: (1) Opus 4.7 launched April 16 with new tokenizer producing up to 35% more tokens for same input; (2) Claude MAU +44% Mar→Apr to 23M, biggest growth among top AI apps in April (BigGo/Similarweb); (3) Continued compute strain. Confidence upgraded medium-high → high.

Q3 FY2026 earnings: AI business ARR $37B (+123% YoY); Microsoft 365 Copilot 20M paid seats (vs 15M Jan, +33% in Q3); Azure +40%. Microsoft-OpenAI partnership restructured Apr 27 (non-exclusive). Confidence upgraded low → medium.

FASTEST-GROWING vendor in v0.80. K2.6 launched Apr 20 (1T params, 262K context, ties GPT-5.5 on SWE-Bench Pro at 80% lower cost). ARR doubled $100M → $200M Mar → Apr. $2B funding round closing May 6 at $20B valuation. OpenRouter weekly volume 1.85T tokens (#2 globally).
DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash launched April 24 (1M token context, 1.6T params MoE / 49B active). Now #3 in enterprise developer SDK usage.

FIRST NEGATIVE-GROWTH VENDOR IN GATT HISTORY. MAU dropped 12.5% Mar→Apr to 12.2M; tumbled from 2nd to 5th place in mobile app rankings; 80+ staff (incl. several co-founders) left xAI; Claude (+44%) and Gemini (+19%) gained share.

Cascade from Gemini +12T (Pichai 16B/min Q1), Anthropic +3T (Opus 4.7 + MAU +44%), Microsoft +1.9T (Q3 FY26), Kimi +1T (K2.6), DeepSeek +1T (V4), Qwen +0.5T, Hunyuan +0.3T. Volume gap closed in five weeks (was 57/38) as US hard data accumulated; pricing gap unchanged at 15×.
Apr 27–May 4 source sweep found no newer hard token-throughput disclosures. Standard weekly extrapolation at vendor-specific monthly growth rates.
OFFICIAL: openai.com $122B raise announcement (Mar 31, 2026) — 'Our APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API/Codex/enterprise.
OFFICIAL: Volcengine 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026).
